title: Round State
description: Tracks iterative research round state. Written by runner.py _write_round_state() after every save_state() call. Read by stop-check.sh and resume-inject.sh hooks. Lives in the CWD alongside the research report. NOTE: this describes the file the runner actually writes — it is a running-state snapshot for hooks and report writers, not a round-completion record.

workflow_id.description: Stable identifier for this workflow session (from workflow_state.json).

run_id.description: Pipeline run_id for the current round.

topic_slug.description: URL-safe slug for the research topic, used to name artifacts like <slug>-research-report.md.

profile.description: Active pipeline profile for this round.

open_gaps.description: Gap records from gaps.json that have classification != 'OUT_OF_SCOPE'. Populated only after the classify-gaps task completes. Empty list on rounds where classify-gaps has not yet run.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

open_gaps.description: No benchmark for sub-quadratic attention on long documents
